text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I head to the cafeteria for lunch, when...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You gotta try this too, Trainer!
Chubby-wubby!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
My belly is soft like a marshmallow!
Chubby-wubby! It feels so good!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Come on, it may be fun, but you'll never become
an adult acting like this!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If your belly gets any bigger... you might not be
able to fit into your signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Gotcha! I wanna keep fitting into my racewear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After many extra training sessions, Haru Urara's
"chubby-wubby belly" days are over.
